commits.subject: Day 124 (17:49): Fix stale fixture task detection — preseed_session_plan.py doesn't check for pre-existing fixture files (Task 1)

eval.reason: Implementation adds `_check_fixture_already_exists()` to `check_task_contradiction()` with two regex patterns (context-word + number, and bare NNN-description), resolves fixture numbers to `eval/fixtures/local-smoke/NNN-*.json` via glob, and suppresses tasks when files exist. Self-tests pass, fixture #369 is correctly detected as existing, nonexistent fixtures pass through, and unrelated tasks are unaffected.

task_file_title: Fix stale fixture task detection — preseed_session_plan.py doesn't check for pre-existing fixture files
